revisions.description: Adjusted Dashboard Active Changes from fully flush rows to a bounded solid task-card stack so the internal Next Step separator remains distinguishable from item boundaries.
revisions.reason: Active Changes items are compound rows with a secondary Next Step action band; removing item spacing made internal and external separators visually ambiguous and inconsistent with Recent Activity.
revisions.author: AI

revisions.description: Extended the solid surface radius treatment to Callout, OptionCard, and SettingsView inner settings surfaces.
revisions.reason: Callouts and settings controls still used large nested radii and playful icon/scale treatments that conflicted with the reduced-radius dashboard direction.
revisions.author: AI

source.function: SettingsView markup and shared settings surfaces

revisions.description: Aligned the base Card default radius with the reduced-radius hierarchy by changing its default from extra-large to restrained outer-shell radius.
revisions.reason: Reviewer noted that although SurfaceCard and InteractiveCard override radius today, D4 requires shared primitives to encode the solid surface direction for future direct Card usage.
revisions.author: AI
